name: ai-baby-monitor-functions
description: Cloud Functions for the AI Baby Monitor backend

scripts.test:emulator: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project=kidssafecam-test --config ../../firebase.json "node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/*.test.js"
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore,auth
